questions.q: According to April 2026 Ministry of Education data, what percentage of Ontario high school students regularly attended class to meet the attendance standard during the most recent school year?
A newly released April 2026 report from the Canadian Federation of Independent Business (CFIB) warned that Canada is currently experiencing an 'entrepreneurial drought' because:
options: The economy is losing businesses faster than it can create new ones
Venture capital funding has dropped to zero
All corporate tax rates were doubled
questions.correctText: The economy is losing businesses faster than it can create new ones

questions.q: In April 2026, a Canadian military police officer filed a lawsuit against Ottawa and an American manufacturer after being wounded by the accidental discharge of what newly issued handgun?
PlayStation 5 sales recently saw a massive spike in the US as consumers rushed to buy the console before a price hike caused by a crisis involving what component?
Which shoe retailer saw its stock surge after announcing an unexpected pivot to becoming an 'AI compute infrastructure' company?
Which conservative attorney was officially disbarred by the California Supreme Court on April 15, 2026, for his role in trying to overturn the 2020 election?
questions.correctText: The California Supreme Court ordered John Eastman's name stricken from the state roll of attorneys due to his efforts to help Donald Trump block the 2020 election certification.

questions.q: An April 2026 study by NYU Langone researchers analyzing e-bike and scooter crashes found that what proportion of injured patients suffered a traumatic brain injury?
A federal jury found which entertainment giant liable for operating an illegal monopoly over the US concert ticketing market?
Researchers studying the vocalizations of sperm whales reported in April 2026 that the marine mammals' communication system closely parallels what?
Drivers filed a federal class action lawsuit against San Jose on April 15, 2026, over the city's use of nearly 500 automated license plate reader cameras operated by what tech company?
questions.correctText: The lawsuit alleges that the city's widespread deployment of Flock Safety cameras violates the Fourth Amendment by conducting warrantless tracking of vehicle movements.
